name_en: [Genuine Leather] 🔥 The GG Marmont series reinterprets the classic quilted V-shaped leather with a new silhouette and size, showcasing the charm of early autumn. This medium tote is crafted in beige, with gold-tone hardware complementing the stylish silhouette.
name_cn:
[Genuine Leather] 🔥 The GG Marmont series reinterprets the classic quilted V-shaped leather with a new silhouette and size, showcasing the charm of early autumn. This medium tote is crafted in beige, with gold-tone hardware complementing the stylish silhouette.
Beige quilted V-shaped leather
Gold-tone hardware
Brown suede texture, microfiber lining
Double G logo
Inside: 1 zip pocket
Handle height: 22cm
Zip closure
